movie.overview: Three war-torn strangers posing as a family flee Sri Lanka’s civil war to start over in a troubled Paris suburb, but their past traumas resurface as they struggle to survive in their new environment.
movie.tagline: When the war continues to rage in your heart and mind
movie.title: Dheepan

cast.name: Marie Trichet
cast.character: The Young Woman with M. Habib
